title: Trump Threatens to Destroy Kharg Island and Other Key Iranian Energy Sites
summary_full: President Trump said in a newspaper interview that the United States might try to invade the Persian Gulf island, which is Iran’s main oil export hub.
summary_public: President Trump said in a newspaper interview that the United States might try to invade the Persian Gulf island, which is Iran’s main oil export hub.

IR.label: neutral
